title: youngia henryi
intro: Youngia henryi, also known as Chinese crow daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Youngia henryi include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Youngia henryi is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
